title: Slovakian Chicken Pilaf
description: A hearty German-inspired pilaf dish featuring Slovakian flair and tender chicken.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Slovakian sausage and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the pilaf, caraway seeds, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the pilaf is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
